project: EVO CRM Status Label Overhaul Sprint

sections.name: Phase 0 — Stakeholder Sign-Off
sections.purpose: Blocks all implementation until Status Framework v1 is signed
tasks: Schedule definitions workshop: dropped off vs discharged vs voided vs deferred vs authorized vs SOC dates
Confirm LOB qualification checklists (LTC, NHTD, OPWDD, private pay)
Confirm short-term rule: lead loss unless gold LOB open; hidden from sales dash
Confirm NIA fail rule: 6-month ON_HOLD then re-engage approach
Confirm CDPAP remediation approach (discharge vs drop vs archive)
Confirm census definition (billing vs EVV vs CRM service episodes)
Document signed decisions — Status Framework v1 (PowerPoint / doc)

sections.name: Phase 1 — Access & Baseline Audit
tasks: Grant Keren Schema Manager access (read-only preferred)
Keren completes Schema Manager audit (objects, fields, picklists, relationships)
Map CRM table/column names to audit SQL placeholders
Run crm/audit/data-integrity-audit.sql against staging or read replica
Record baseline — orphan authorized count
Record baseline — authorized + dropped/voided intake
Record baseline — CDPAP remediation queue size
Record baseline — third-party referrals (e.g. Girling) counted as patients
Record baseline — pre-intake and closed counts
Record baseline — multi-intake open conflicts
Record baseline — short-term-only pipeline
Record baseline — stale anticipated SOC
Record baseline — census gap (legacy authorized vs true census)
Record baseline — 12+ mo no service but still authorized/active
Record baseline — Medicaid deferred > 30 days
Record baseline — duplicate person candidates
Record baseline — intake column count (121 fields)
Export remediation batch IDs — orphan authorized (Section 14)
Keren identifies top unused intake fields for deprecation
Milestone: Baseline audit complete — all counts recorded in project doc

sections.name: Phase 2 — Schema Design (Staging)
sections.purpose: Picklists, enums, field cleanup in staging
tasks: PHASE 2 — Schema Design (section header)
Import picklists from crm/schema/enums.json into Schema Manager
Add person.lifecycle_stage enum (computed; admin override only)
Add intake.status, intake.nia_status, authorization.status, medicaid_ticket.status enums
Add picklists: drop_reason_category, hold_reason, void_reason, line_of_business
Remove/hide deprecated person fields: patient, lead, authorized, pre-intake, closed tags
Normalize date fields: intake_opened_at, anticipated_soc_date, start_of_care_date, stage_entered_at
Add person_stage_history table for funnel reporting
Document field mapping legacy → new (legacy-status-map.json)

sections.name: Phase 3 — Data Remediation (Staging)
sections.purpose: Batch migration jobs on staging data
tasks: PHASE 3 — Data Remediation (section header)
Build staging migration script from legacy-status-map.json
Remediate pre-intake → ON_HOLD + hold_reason
Split closed → DROPPED_OFF or DISCHARGED
Remediate person-level authorized → compute from intakes + auth
CDPAP batch — apply sunset rules
Third-party referral batch (Girling; is_agency_patient=false)
Orphan authorized batch — downgrade intakes without AUTH_APPROVED
Voided/dropped intakes — clear authorized display
Re-run data-integrity-audit.sql on staging; compare to Phase 1 baseline
Ops sign-off on sample of 50 remediated records
Milestone: Staging remediation validated — gap acceptable

sections.name: Phase 4 — Validation & Automation (Staging)
tasks: PHASE 4 — Validation & Automation (section header)
Implement blocking rule: AUTHORIZED_PENDING_SOC requires AUTH_APPROVED auth
Implement blocking rule: PATIENT_ACTIVE requires start_of_care_date
Implement blocking rule: DROPPED_OFF requires drop_reason + category
Implement blocking rule: ON_HOLD requires hold_reason + hold_until_date
Implement blocking rule: short-term-only cannot set person above REFERRAL_ACTIVE
Implement automation triggers (all 7)
Implement computeLifecycleStage from crm/schema/lifecycle.ts (server-side computed field)
Implement SLA timers: lead 24h, follow-up 3d, referral→intake 7d, authorized→SOC 14d

sections.name: Phase 5 — Dashboard Rebuild
tasks: PHASE 5 — Dashboard Rebuild (section header)
Deploy views from crm/audit/dashboard-queries.sql (adjust table names)
Sales dashboard: v_sales_dashboard — gold LOBs only, no terminal, no short-term-only
Add list columns: lifecycle_stage, primary_lob, intake_opened_at, next_action_date, nia_status, days_in_stage
Ops dashboard: v_ops_dashboard + stale anticipated SOC + CDPAP remediation queues
True census widget: COUNT from v_active_census
Funnel leakage report: v_funnel_leakage by drop_reason_category
QA query: zero rows on "never show on dashboard" violations
UAT with Angelo (sales) and ops leads — no multi-click drill-down needed

sections.name: Phase 6 — Production Cutover
tasks: PHASE 6 — Production Cutover (section header)
Final stakeholder sign-off on staging UAT results
Production migration window scheduled (communicate to sales + ops)
Run remediation batch in production
Enable validation rules in production
Enable computed lifecycle_stage in production
Switch dashboards to new views
Post-cutover: re-run audit Section 9 — confirm census gap closed
Monitor SLA alerts for 2 weeks post-cutover

sections.name: Phase 7 — Cleanup & Florida Handoff
tasks: Deprecate unused intake fields (121 → ~40 target)
Document NY Status Framework v1 as canonical
Create Florida delta checklist (NY vs FL differences)
Rename Teams group to New York Operations (if not done)

sections.name: Ongoing — Discovery (Keren)
tasks: Raise pointed questions via Teams as inconsistencies found — no prod changes
Produce PowerPoint deliverable: labels, LOB rules, use cases, lead-to-patient flow
Maintain open questions log until Phase 0 closed
Joel: compile and share department playbooks (Angela playbook + others)
Send Keren the Angela playbook
